name: Nkrumah Basic Room
description: Experience comfort and affordability in our Nkrumah Basic Room, a cozy haven designed for up to 2 guests. Ideal for solo travelers or couples, this inviting space offers a relaxing retreat after a day of exploration or business.
amenities: Quality Toiletries (towels, dental kit, body wash)

name: Fela Standard Room
description: Discover the Fela Room, an exceptional retreat that redefines spacious luxury and comfort, designed for up to 2 guests. This room offers a more expansive layout and an array of thoughtfully curated amenities that cater to your every need.
amenities: Quality Toiletries (towels, dental kit, body wash)

name: Zik Standard Plus Room
description: Welcome to the Zik Room, a standard plus spacious retreat designed to accommodate up to 3 guests in ultimate comfort. Experience the blend of comfort and spaciousness that makes the Zik Room a true home away from home.
features: In-Room Electric Kettle with Tea Essentials
HDTV with Netflix, Amazon Prime & DSTV
amenities: Quality Toiletries (towels, dental kit, body wash)

name: Mandela Suite
description: Welcome to the Mandela Suite, an expansive and luxurious accommodation designed for families and larger groups. Features a king-sized bed, a cozy sitting room with convertible sofa bed, and an en-suite bathroom — a true home away from home.
features: En-suite Living Room with Convertible Sofa Bed
HDTV with Netflix, Amazon Prime & DSTV
amenities: In-Room Electric Kettle with Tea Essentials
Quality Toiletries (towels, dental kit, body wash)
